title: Growth vs Stuck Patterns Over Time
description: Over multiple conversations, it becomes possible to notice whether someone is moving toward growth (increased awareness, trying new behaviors, self-compassion) or staying in stuck loops (same patterns repeating without change).
observation_language: Over the past few weeks, I’ve noticed you’re becoming more aware of certain patterns and starting to respond differently.
There seems to be a recurring cycle that keeps showing up, even though part of you wants to break out of it.
It looks like you’ve made progress in some areas while other patterns are still quite strong.
